childhood.familyBackground: Academic family with strong technical background. Father was professor and engineer.

childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in academic and technical environment. Early exposure to computers and programming.

careerTimeline.event: Founded healthcare IT company in Madison
Built major electronic health records system

careerTimeline.eventKo: 선도적 의료 정보 기술 회사가 됨

failures.descriptionKo: 의료 IT 채택이 저항 및 어려움 직면

failures.lessonKo: 의료 IT는 강력한 고객 지원이 필요

quotes.textKo: 기술은 환자 치료 및 결과를 개선한다
